basic_details.job_title: Delhi Public School Rourkela Teaching and Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 15 PGT, Peon and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Delhi Public School Rourkela has officially announced the Teaching and Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 with 15 vacancies. The detailed notification was published in 2026 at the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 40–45 years (post-wise) and hold qualifications such as Post Graduate with B.Ed, Graduate with B.Ed, MBA/MPA, PGDCA, or Senior Secondary pass (as per post requirement) are eligible to apply. Applicants can submit their applications in offline/Online mode on or before 08 July 2026. The official notification PDF and application form details are available below.

application_fee.all_fee: ₹1,000/- (Rupees one thousand only) in shape of Demand Draft drawn in favour of "Delhi Public School Rourkela" payable at Rourkela.

age_limit.age_details: Sl. No. 1 to 5: Max 45 years. Sl. No. 6 to 13: Max 40 years.
age_limit.details: Sl. No. 1 to 5: Maximum 45 years as on 30 June 2026. Sl. No. 6 to 13: Maximum 40 years as on 30 June 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate 1st Division with B.Ed., Graduation 1st Division with B.Ed., Graduate 1st Division with B.Ed., Graduation 1st Div. with Master in Public Admin / MBA., Graduation 1st Division with PGDCA., Passed Sr. Secondary Certificate Exam.
qualification.details: PGT History, PGT Psychology: Post Graduate 1st Division with B.Ed. TGT-Academic English: Post Graduate 1st Division with B.Ed. TGT English, TGT Math, PRT English: Graduation 1st Division with B.Ed. PRT Dance / Music: Graduate 1st Division with B.Ed. Asst. Estate Officer: Graduation 1st Div. with Master in Public Admin / MBA. Receptionist, Office Asst. (Admin), Office Asst. (Academics): Graduation 1st Division with PGDCA. Peon, Daftary: Passed Sr. Secondary Certificate Exam.

salary_details.pay_scale: As per norms of Delhi Public School Society
salary_details.details: As per norms of Delhi Public School Society

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Delhi Public School Rourkela Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline/Online mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://dpsrkl.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Delhi Public School Rourkela Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Delhi Public School Rourkela Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Delhi Public School Rourkela Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Delhi Public School Rourkela Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline/Online mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://dpsrkl.in/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Delhi Public School Rourkela Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for the Delhi Public School Rourkela Recruitment 2026 is 08 July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Delhi Public School Rourkela Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 15 vacancies available for various posts including PGT, TGT, PRT, and Admin positions in the Delhi Public School Rourkela Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the PGT posts?
faq.answer: For the PGT posts, candidates must possess a Post Graduate degree with a 1st Division and a B.Ed. qualification. Specific subjects may have additional requirements as detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for the Delhi Public School Rourkela Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee for all categories is ₹1,000/-. This amount should be paid in the form of a Demand Draft drawn in favour of "Delhi Public School Rourkela" payable at Rourkela.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the PGT and TGT posts?
faq.answer: For PGT and TGT posts (Sl. No. 1 to 5), the maximum age limit is 45 years as on 30 June 2026. For PRT and other administrative posts (Sl. No. 6 to 13), the maximum age limit is 40 years as on the same date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Delhi Public School Rourkela Recruitment 2026 will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview. Candidates must perform well in both stages to be considered for the final selection.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the Delhi Public School Rourkela Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it out carefully, attach necessary documents, and send it via Speed Post or Registered Post to the address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q8. What is the official website of Delhi Public School Rourkela?
faq.answer: The official website of Delhi Public School Rourkela is https://dpsrkl.in/. Candidates can visit this website to download the application form and find more details about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations mentioned in the notification?
faq.answer: The provided data does not explicitly mention age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification PDF for any information regarding age relaxation for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q10. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary for all the recruited posts will be as per the norms of the Delhi Public School Society. Specific details regarding the pay scale for each post are not provided in the summary data.
